task_completion.description: Select 'Malaria RDT Positive' as the data element and 'Bo' District as the organization unit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The left-hand dimension panels or the chart layout/legend explicitly show 'Malaria RDT Positive' and 'Bo' or 'Bo District'.

task_completion.description: Select the monthly periods for the year 2023.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The x-axis or period dimension panel displays the months of 2023 (e.g., Jan 2023, Feb 2023, etc.).

task_completion.description: Configure the visualization as a line chart with cumulative values enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main visualization is a line chart. The plotted line must show a cumulative trend (strictly moving upwards or staying flat, never dipping downwards) across the months.

task_completion.description: Add a base line at 5,000 labeled 'Minimum Threshold'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A horizontal line is visible on the chart at the 5,000 mark on the y-axis, accompanied by the text label 'Minimum Threshold'.

task_completion.description: Add a target line at 25,000 labeled 'Annual Projection'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A horizontal line is visible on the chart at the 25,000 mark on the y-axis, accompanied by the text label 'Annual Projection'.

task_completion.description: Save the visualization as a favorite named 'Bo Malaria Cumulative Analysis 2023'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top-left title bar of the visualization or the 'Save' dialog box displays the exact name 'Bo Malaria Cumulative Analysis 2023'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the DHIS2 graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the standard DHIS2 Data Visualizer web interface, not a terminal, API client, or code editor.

integrity.description: The chart is genuinely rendered by the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart appears in the main canvas area with standard DHIS2 Highcharts styling, tooltips, or layout elements, rather than being an edited image or text.

integrity.description: The chart actually plots data points rather than just displaying empty threshold lines.
integrity.visual_evidence: A data line for Malaria RDT Positive is visible and plotted against the y-axis, interacting visually with the base and target lines.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The visualization must be named exactly 'Bo Malaria Cumulative Analysis 2023'. The target line must be set at exactly 25,000 and labeled 'Annual Projection'. The base line must be set at exactly 5,000 and labeled 'Minimum Threshold'. The data element is 'Malaria RDT Positive' and the organization unit is 'Bo'. The chart must display cumulative values, meaning the data line should trend consistently upwards.
